'''Black 3''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] assigned to [[Black Squadron (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Black Squadron]]. The [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was flown by [[TIE pilot]] [[DS-61-3]], nicknamed "Backstabber,"<ref name="CCG-Black3" /> and the craft was stationed aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].<ref name="ANH" />

The [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] had the stylized image of a [[Corellian slice hound]] on the inner hatch.<ref name="CCG-Black3" /> During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Black 3 was destroyed by the [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''. The fighter was covering [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while he attempted to stop [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] from launching [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the Death Star's [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]]. Solo swooped in behind Black 3, destroying the fighter with his [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].<ref name="ANH" />
